definition: The act of taking up and holding onto experience, views, habits, or identity.
notes: Clinging is the clearest general rendering and works well in dependent origination. Fuel remains useful in explanatory prose when the fire metaphor of ongoing becoming is being emphasized.

context_rules.context: In most doctrinal and dependent-origination contexts

context_rules.notes: Acceptable when the motion of taking hold is central.

context_rules.context: In explanatory prose tied to the fire metaphor
context_rules.notes: Use selectively because it is not the default doctrinal gloss.
